10001011100111001111111011010000001110000011001001001010101 - ASI: 25

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  100 = 1 * 00
  101 = 1 * 01
  111 = 1 * 11
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0101 = 01 * 01
  00111 = 00 * 111
  000001 = 0000 * 01
  100100 = 100 * 100
  101101 = 101 * 101
  1000101 = 100 * 0101
  1010101 = 101 * 0101
  1100111 = 11 * 00111
  00111111 = 00111 * 111
  000000111 = 0000 * 00111
  100100100 = 100 * 100100
  00111111101101 = 00111111 * 101101
  10001011100111 = 1000101 * 1100111
  000000111000001 = 000000111 * 000001
  1001001001010101 = 100100100 * 1010101
  1000101110011100111111101101 = 10001011100111 * 00111111101101
  0000001110000011001001001010101 = 000000111000001 * 1001001001010101
  10001011100111001111111011010000001110000011001001001010101 = 1000101110011100111111101101 * 0000001110000011001001001010101
